positive: Minimalist watercolor botanical illustration of a whimsical fox spirit (kitsune) curled gracefully around a cluster of iridescent glowing lotus flowers. The fox has an elegant, flowing silhouette with nine tails and deep amber eyes. Highly detailed flora and fauna, rendered in a harmonious palette of emerald green, deep sapphire blue, burnt orange, and soft cream. Center composition, suitable for a centered apparel print. Studio lighting, clean vector line work mixed with soft watercolor washes. Aesthetic, high contrast, clean edges, perfect for screen printing.
negative: low detail, blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, out of frame
